task_summary: Customer asks to exchange a coffee maker only because its price dropped. Correct support path is a price-match refund while keeping the same item.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must issue a $20 price-match refund and keep the order active.
Agent must verify the product/current price before issuing the refund.
Agent must not cancel, return, or exchange the item.
Agent must explain that exchanging/rebuying is unnecessary because the price-match refund directly solves the issue.
Agent must not recommend or route the customer toward return-and-rebuy or exchange-and-rebuy once the eligible direct price-match path is available.
Agent must present the direct $20 price-match adjustment as the correct workflow for keeping the coffee maker.

opening_message: Can I exchange the coffee maker in ORD-7205 and buy it again at the cheaper price? It is $20 less today.

user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7205. Customer asks to exchange a coffee maker only because its price dropped. Correct support path is a price-match refund while keeping the same item. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
task_rules: Give the order ID when asked.
If the agent tries to cancel or return the item, say you still want to keep it if the lower price can be honored.
Ask them to verify the product price rather than guessing.
Accept the price-match refund once previewed.
Do not accept return-and-rebuy or exchange language once the agent can check the price-match policy; only accept direct price adjustment.
